Stub functions and control operations for Bluetooth advertising, analytics, bonding, communication, GATT, HRM, identity, initialization, logging, pairing, reconnection, and scanning in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[adv_reconnect.c](adv_reconnect.c.md)**: Defines a function to get advertising job terms for Bluetooth reconnection.
- **[advert.c](advert.c.md)**: Stub functions for Bluetooth advertising operations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[analytics.c](analytics.c.md)**: Implements stub functions for Bluetooth analytics, including connection quality and BLE parameters.
- **[bonding_sync.c](bonding_sync.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth bonding events for adding and removing host bondings.
- **[bt_classic_stubs.c](bt_classic_stubs.c.md)**: Stub implementations for Bluetooth Classic connection functions.
- **[bt_test.c](bt_test.c.md)**: Bluetooth driver test functions for starting, stopping, and handling HCI passthrough and RF test modes.
- **[comm.c](comm.c.md)**: Bluetooth communication scheduling and task management functions for the Pebble firmware.
- **[connectability.c](connectability.c.md)**: Defines an empty function for updating Bluetooth classic connectability.
- **[features.c](features.c.md)**: Defines a function to check if the Bluetooth driver supports classic Bluetooth, returning false.
- **[gap_le_connect.c](gap_le_connect.c.md)**: Implements a stub function for disconnecting a Bluetooth Low Energy device.
- **[gap_le_device_name.c](gap_le_device_name.c.md)**: Stub functions for requesting Bluetooth GAP LE device names.
- **[gap_le_scan.c](gap_le_scan.c.md)**: Functions to start and stop Bluetooth Low Energy (LE) scanning with configurable parameters.
- **[gatt.c](gatt.c.md)**: Stub functions for GATT read subscription response and changed indication in Bluetooth firmware.
- **[gatt_client_discovery.c](gatt_client_discovery.c.md)**: Implements GATT client discovery API functions for starting, stopping, and handling discovery.
- **[gatt_client_operations.c](gatt_client_operations.c.md)**: Functions for GATT client operations including read and write in a Bluetooth firmware context.
- **[hrm_service.c](hrm_service.c.md)**: Stub functions for handling Bluetooth HRM service support and measurements.
- **[id.c](id.c.md)**: Functions for setting and copying Bluetooth device identity and address information.
- **[init.c](init.c.md)**: Bluetooth driver initialization and control functions, including start, stop, and power down operations.
- **[logging.c](logging.c.md)**: Stub functions for setting and getting the logging level in a Bluetooth firmware.
- **[pairability.c](pairability.c.md)**: Functions to enable or disable Bluetooth LE and classic pairability.
- **[pairing_confirm.c](pairing_confirm.c.md)**: Stub function for Bluetooth pairing confirmation in the Pebble firmware.
- **[pebble_pairing_service.c](pebble_pairing_service.c.md)**: Handles status changes for Bluetooth pairing in the Pebble firmware.
- **[reconnect.c](reconnect.c.md)**: Bluetooth reconnection control functions for pausing, resuming, and resetting intervals.
- **[responsiveness.c](responsiveness.c.md)**: Defines a function to update Bluetooth LE connection parameters, always returning true.
- **[sniff.c](sniff.c.md)**: Defines a stub function for retrieving the Bluetooth sniff interval in the firmware.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling Bluetooth firmware with specific source files and dependencies.
